type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Lower stack test results for Dryer.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Results from stack testing conducted in 2024 were used in place of stack testing results completed in previous years.  Although particulate emissions from the dryer exclude condensable particulate matter (CPM), it is unknown if emissions associated with the baghouse exclude CPM.  Additionally, the Plant did not meet reporting requirements to include particulate emissions associated with vehicles travelling on unpaved roads (i.e., <10000 Vehicle Kilometers Travelled (VKT) per year), which resulted in a decrease in particulate emissions.
